sponsor.title: GoldFix Members: Exclusive Bullion Pricing Now Available
sponsor.dek:
GoldFix has partnered with Battalion Metals to give our community direct access to institutional-grade physical bullion at exclusive member pricing.

Battalion Metals is owned and operated by GoldFix founder Christopher Olson in partnership with Tucker Carlson. Through this partnership, GoldFix members can purchase gold and silver products at pricing typically about 100 basis points below prevailing dealer rates, generally 2.5%–3.5% over spot, depending on the product and real-time inventory.

As an added benefit, shipping insurance cost has been waived for GoldFix orders.

This program is designed as a value-add for GoldFix Premium and Founding subscribers, providing a trusted channel for acquiring physical metal at competitive entry points.
